name: amigahorse-web
description: AmigaHorse_Web — open-source Amiga-emulator in de browser. Twee routes: Quick BASIC mode + Full configurable.

scripts.build:wasm: echo 'TODO v0.0.2.x sub-step 3: emcc-pipeline op external/vamigaweb/Core/. Eerst: source tools/emscripten-env.sh. Zie external/README.md.' && exit 1

comment: Vanilla JS by design (geen React/Vue/Svelte v0.0.2). Native ES-modules. esbuild bundelt src/ → dist/. Lokaal hosten met COOP+COEP-headers vereist voor SharedArrayBuffer-PTHREAD. Zie docs/BASIC_MODE.md.
